description: Utilities for working with the Web Audio API, including sound generation and analysis.

modules.name: audio-utils
modules.description: A collection of helpers for sound synthesis, microphone input, and audio analysis.

functions.name: getAudioContext
functions.description: Safely creates and returns a singleton AudioContext, handling suspended states.

functions.name: playFrequency
functions.description: Plays a simple tone using an OscillatorNode.

functions.name: createMicrophoneSource
functions.description: Requests microphone access and returns a promise resolving to a MediaStreamAudioSourceNode and its stream.

functions.name: createAnalyser
functions.description: Creates and configures an AnalyserNode.

functions.name: getFrequencyData
functions.description: Gets the frequency data from an analyser into a Uint8Array.

functions.name: getWaveformData
functions.description: Gets the time-domain (waveform) data from an analyser.

modules.name: audio-effects
modules.description: A comprehensive module for creating Web Audio API effects and filters.

functions.name: createGain
functions.description: Creates a Gain node.

functions.name: createFilter
functions.description: Creates a BiquadFilter node.

functions.name: createDelay
functions.description: Creates a Delay node with a feedback loop.

functions.name: createPanner
functions.description: Creates a StereoPanner node.

functions.name: createCompressor
functions.description: Creates a DynamicsCompressor node.

functions.name: createReverb
functions.description: Creates a Reverb effect using a ConvolverNode and a generated impulse response.

functions.name: connectNodes
functions.description: Connects an array of AudioNodes in sequence.

functions.name: disconnectNodes
functions.description: Disconnects all outgoing connections from a set of AudioNodes.

description: Modules for importing, exporting, and parsing data from various sources and formats.

modules.name: import-utils
modules.description: A collection of helpers for importing data from external sources like Git repositories.

functions.name: fetchFromGitHubRaw
functions.description: Fetches the raw content of a file from a public GitHub repository.

functions.name: getGitHubRepoDirectoryContents
functions.description: Fetches the contents (files and directories) of a directory in a public GitHub repository. Can filter files by type.

functions.name: getGitHubRepoFileCount
functions.description: Gets the count of files within a directory in a public GitHub repository, with optional file type filtering.

functions.name: getRandomFileFromGitHubRepo
functions.description: Fetches random files from a directory in a public GitHub repository, with optional file type and count filtering. Automatically handles text and binary (media) files.
params: options?: { fileTypes?: string | string[], count?: number }
functions.returns: Promise<{ content: string; file: GitHubContent; isBinary: boolean; }[]>

functions.name: getNthFileFromGitHubRepo
functions.description: Fetches Nth file(s) from a directory in a public GitHub repository, with optional filtering. Automatically handles text and binary (media) files.
params: options?: { fileTypes?: string | string[], start?: number, count?: number }
functions.returns: Promise<{ content: string; file: GitHubContent; isBinary: boolean; }[]>

modules.name: export-utils
modules.description: A collection of helpers for exporting data to various file formats.

functions.name: exportToCsv
functions.description: Converts an array of objects into a CSV string and triggers a browser download.

description: Utilities for managing concurrent operations and leveraging multi-threading in the browser.

modules.name: worker-utils
modules.description: A collection of helpers for creating and communicating with Web Workers.

functions.name: createWorkerFromFunction
functions.description: Creates a Web Worker from a self-contained function, avoiding the need for separate worker script files.

functions.name: postMessagePromise
functions.description: Sends a message to a worker and returns a promise that resolves with the worker's response.

description: Utilities and modules for themeing, styling, and visual design.

modules.name: palette-generator
modules.description: A utility that uses the Gemini API to generate color palettes from text prompts.

functions.name: generatePalette
functions.description: Generates a color palette based on a descriptive prompt.

modules.name: gradient-generator
modules.description: A utility that uses the Gemini API to generate CSS gradients from text prompts.

functions.name: generateGradient
functions.description: Generates a CSS gradient string based on a descriptive prompt.

modules.name: layout-calculator
modules.description: A utility for calculating layout dimensions based on classic design principles like the golden ratio.

functions.name: calculateGoldenRatio
functions.description: Calculates the major and minor segments of a total dimension based on the golden ratio.

modules.name: theme-manager
modules.description: A comprehensive module for applying, creating, importing, and exporting UI themes.

functions.name: applyTheme
functions.description: Applies a theme object's colors to the document's CSS variables.

functions.name: exportTheme
functions.description: Exports a theme object to a JSON file and triggers a download.

functions.name: importTheme
functions.description: Imports a theme from a JSON file, validates it, and returns it.
